questionHtml:
What is contained in skeletal muscle?

A.  Cross bridges between muscle fibres

B.  Sarcomeres formed of contractile myofibrils

C.  Myosin filaments forming cross bridges with troponin and tropomyosin

D.  Multinucleate cells with numerous microfibrils made of contractile sarcomeres

meta.title: What is contained in skeletal muscle? A. Cross bridges between muscle fibres B. Sarcomeres formed of contractile myofibrils C. Myosin filaments forming cross bridges with troponin
